title: Close My Screen
description: Close GUIs by clicking the empty space.
body:
Close the current screen by clicking outside the GUI.

Works with inventory screens and the chat screen, compatible with JEI.

![Demo.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/STmMQcNi/images/80a79e46123b5c68023a7efff3f9cca5c9c73bb4.gif)

Should be compatible with most mods that add buttons to the screen. If a mod adds a button in an unconvential manner, it may require special attention. If you find any incompatibilities or other issues, feel free to make a new issue on the issues page or message me on discord.



Icon by CyndaFR.
